revision.comment: 1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Infobox_deity]]: importing template for usage here
remove the word "equivalent" as per talk discussion
1 revision imported: trying to fix the {{/n}} thing
Copying from [[Category:No local image but image on Wikidata]] to [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia17]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia17]] to [[Category:dd]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Dd]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia17]] to [[Category:dd]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
putting category to lowercase
Removing from [[Category:Dd]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Pages and categories from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Pages from Wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:Pages from Wikipedia]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:bump-01-18]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:bump 1-26]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Infobox deity]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]<!--redirecting existing page-->

revision.comment: Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) to last revision by [[User:en>Redtigerxyz|en>Redtigerxyz]]
Text replacement - "ategory" to "ategory:qq]][[sn:"
Text replacement - "qq" to "11"
Text replacement - "|Artifacts" to "|burial goods"
Text replacement - "[[Category:11]]" to ""
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Adding [[Category:qq]][[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q10809670)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 5 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23460549766|manual triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24938264069|time triggered pipeline]]
